# MCPlet

> MCPlet is a code-first convention profile on top of Model Context Protocol (MCP) and MCP Apps. It defines constrained, single-intent capability units with explicit visibility, authentication, and safety boundaries for AI operations.

## Canonical Pages
- [Homepage](https://mcplet.ai/)
- [Getting started](https://mcplet.ai/getting-started.html)
- [Specification overview](https://mcplet.ai/spec/)
- [Technical FAQ](https://mcplet.ai/faq.html)
- [Patent notice](https://mcplet.ai/patent-notice.html)
- [Raw specification markdown](https://mcplet.ai/files/MCPlet-spec-v202603-03.md)

## Current Draft
- Version: v202603-03
- Status: Draft
- Date: 2026-03-27

## Key Concepts
- Single-intent capability units
- read / prepare / action classification
- Code-first `_meta` contract
- Host-managed orchestration and state
- Optional MCP Apps UI
- Passkey authentication for protected actions
- Getting started path for hosts and tool authors
